text:
29. Alteration of Memorandum by change of name.-
(1) The change of name shall not be allowed to a company which has defaulted in filing its annual returns or
financial statements or any document due for filing with the Registrar or which has defaulted in repayment of
matured deposits or debentures or interest on deposits or debentures.
(2) An application shall be filed in Form No.INC.24 along with the fee for change in the name of the company and
a new certificate of incorporation in Form No.INC.25 shall be issued to the company consequent upon change of
name.
section_title: 29. Alteration of Memorandum by change of name.-
